Inter.rationale: Inter's geometric neutrality paired with Lora's warm curves creates a balanced editorial system.
A go-to pairing for digital publishing — clean sans headlines with a highly readable serif body.

Playfair Display.rationale: High-contrast serif headlines anchored by a humanist serif for readable body copy.
Two literary serifs in conversation — Lora's softer curves balance Playfair's drama.

Montserrat.rationale: Geometric sans headlines contrast beautifully with Merriweather's sturdy serif body.
A popular pairing for professional publications and brand identities.

Roboto.rationale: Roboto's mechanical precision softened by Lora's calligraphic warmth.
Google's own pairing philosophy — humanist sans meets sturdy reading serif.

Lato.rationale: Lato's semi-rounded character works harmoniously with Merriweather's warmth.
A clean pairing for corporate and editorial contexts alike.

Poppins.rationale: Poppins' rounded geometric forms paired with Lora's calligraphic elegance.
A fresh take on the geometric-sans-plus-serif pairing.

Oswald.rationale: Oswald's condensed impact headlines pair naturally with Lora's warm reading comfort.
A strong display-to-body contrast for news and editorial layouts.

Merriweather.rationale: Elegant display with a dependable reading serif.
High contrast between condensed display and open body type.

Lora.rationale: Two serifs with different personalities creating a refined typographic system.
Drama at the headline, comfort in the body.

Raleway.rationale: Raleway's elegant geometry above Lora's warm serif body creates refined hierarchy.
A popular pairing for fashion and lifestyle brands.

Open Sans.rationale: Open Sans's neutral clarity pairs with Lora's warmth for approachable editorial design.
A trusted workhorse pairing for content-heavy sites.

Nunito.rationale: Nunito's rounded friendliness paired with Lora's literary warmth.
Approachable and readable across app and editorial contexts.

Bebas Neue.rationale: Bold all-caps display paired with a refined reading serif.
Strong typographic contrast between heavy condensed display and open serif body.

Source Sans 3.rationale: The Source superfamily pairing — designed to work together by Adobe.
A clean workhorse sans with a warm calligraphic serif.

Work Sans.rationale: Work Sans's optical precision pairs with Lora's warmth for professional layouts.
A reliable pairing for SaaS and tech editorial work.

DM Sans.rationale: DM Sans's low-contrast geometry complements Lora's calligraphic serif details.
A refined system for product and editorial design.

Space Grotesk.rationale: Space Grotesk's quirky geometry anchored by Source Serif's reliable readability.
Tech-forward display paired with literary body type.

Cormorant Garamond.rationale: High-contrast old-style serif headlines with a clean humanist sans body.
Two serifs in elegant dialogue for luxury and literary contexts.

EB Garamond.rationale: A timeless old-style serif heading over a clean modern sans.
Two humanist serifs for a refined literary feel.

Abril Fatface.rationale: Dramatic fatface display with a warm serif body for magazine layouts.
High contrast poster headline paired with a readable editorial serif.

Dancing Script.rationale: Script display with a neutral sans body keeps the layout readable and friendly.
Two rounded, friendly typefaces for warm and approachable designs.

Josefin Sans.rationale: Josefin's geometric elegance above Lora's warm calligraphic serif.
A chic pairing for fashion and editorial projects.

Spectral.rationale: Spectral's refined serif headlines with a neutral sans body for digital reading.
Elegant display serif over a clean UI sans for product editorial.

Fraunces.rationale: Fraunces's expressive old-style headlines with a clean sans for contrast.
Two serifs with strong personalities for literary and brand contexts.

Syne.rationale: Syne's experimental geometry grounded by Source Serif's reliable readability.
A contemporary pairing for creative agencies and design studios.

Unbounded.rationale: Unbounded's wide geometric forms paired with Inter's neutral versatility.
Bold display geometry meets refined serif for editorial contrast.

JetBrains Mono.rationale: A developer-native pairing — monospace code display with a clean UI sans.
Technical precision paired with a humanist sans for documentation.

Fira Code.rationale: Fira Code's programming ligatures over a humanist sans for technical writing.
A clean developer pairing for code-centric interfaces.
